To return a purchase, you need to bring the following paperwork:

1. Proof of purchase – this is the document handed over to you together with the product on delivery.
2. Original packaging – the manufacturer's packaging that came with the item.
3. Any free promotional items such as gifts or accessories delivered with the purchased item.

These are the requirements for a valid return procedure according to Kibuga's Return Policy.

The process may take up to 2 days from when your return request was submitted.

If your return claim is rejected, we will call you to explain the issue and send the item(s) back to you. We will arrange the delivery of the item. Note that we will make two (2) attempts to return the product to you at no cost. However, after two (2) failed attempts, we will cancel the return process and store the product at our warehouse for up to seven (7) days awaiting your collection. If you do not collect the product within these seven (7) days, it will be deemed as forfeited and we will dispose off in accordance with the Ugandan law.

You are forbidden from posting content that is offensive, obscene, indecent, pornographic, lewd, suggestive, sexually explicit, depicts violence in an explicit, graphic or gratuitous manner, blasphemous, discriminatory, inflammatory, causes annoyance, inconvenience or needless anxiety to any person, constitutes spam, illegal, infringes on any person's legal rights, or gives rise to legal action against any person. Kibuga collects various types of personal data including:
- Contact details such as Name, postal addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses.
- Demographic information like Date of birth, age, and gender.
- Online registration information such as Passwords and authentication information.
- Payment information including Credit card information and billing address.
- Survey responses for customer satisfaction surveys and market research.
- Competition entries and submissions.
- Marketing preferences.

Additionally, Kibuga collects automatically collected data or from third parties like:
- Device information such as PC, tablet, mobile device, operating system, browser, IP address.
- Usage information including Searches, views, downloads, purchases, web pages visited.
- User-generated content such as Blogs and social media postings.
- Social media data like Username or ID, profile photo, followers.

The full returns procedure from request to refund involves several steps:

1. **Notification**: You must notify Kibuga within 2 days of receiving your purchase by calling Customer Service at 0742511381/0742511394.

2. **Return Request Submission**: Submit a return request through the notification process, which includes providing proof of purchase (the document handed over to you together with the product on delivery), original packaging, and any free promotional items delivered with the purchased item.

3. **Pick-Up Attempts**: Kibuga will make 3 attempts within 2 working days to pick up your returned item after submitting the return request. If the package is found damaged during these attempts, it will be rejected by the rider or sent back for quality check. After 3 pick-up attempts, if you still do not provide the item, Kibuga will cancel the return procedure and store the product at their warehouse for up to seven (7) days awaiting your collection.

4. **Refund Process**: If all conditions are met and the claim is valid, Kibuga will perform a quality check on the returned item. Upon confirmation of validity, they will refund you according to your requested method: Payments in respect of the product price, shipping fees as stated on the refunds page, store credits, wallet refunds, vouchers, mobile money transfer, bank transfers or such other method as determined from time to time.

5. **Invalid Claims**: If the claim is invalid, Kibuga will send the item back to you after two (2) attempts at no cost. After two failed attempts, they will cancel the return process and store the product at their warehouse for up to seven (7) days awaiting your collection. If not collected within these seven (7) days, it will be disposed off in accordance with Ugandan law.

6. **Customer Communication**: Throughout this process, Kibuga keeps you updated by email and SMS about the status of your return. For any inquiries, contact their Customer Service Call Center at 0742511381/0742511394.

Customers with unjustified or invalid returns may be denied the right to return items in the future.

Kibuga can refund you according to your requested refund method after performing a careful quality check of the returned item. If the claim is valid, we will refund you based on the method you choose. The process may take up to 2 days from when your return request was submitted. If the claim is invalid, the item will be sent back to you.

Kibuga can take several enforcement actions against a seller who breaches the terms. These include:
1. Sending formal warnings.
2. Suspending, prohibiting or blocking access to the marketplace as per the general terms and conditions.
3. Applying penalties for breach as provided in the Seller Penalty Policy.
4. Commencing legal action against the seller, whether for breach of contract or otherwise.

These actions are detailed across different sections of the policies, including Sellers Terms and Conditions, Confidentiality and Data Privacy, and Limitations and Exclusions of Liability.

Kibuga may make tax-related deductions to payments processed by us on your behalf and remit such deducted amounts to the relevant government or tax authority. Therefore, any taxes applicable to the transactions entered into on the marketplace with buyers, including VAT, are handled through these deductions. The amount of the commission is automatically adjusted in case of an upwards revision in the rate of VAT or other applicable taxes, ensuring that Kibuga's net revenues remain constant. This means that after all necessary tax-related deductions, what remains is the seller's net revenue from the transaction.

To return an item and receive your money back as per Kibuga's Return Policy:

1. **Notification**: You have 2 days from receiving the purchase to notify Kibuga of a return by calling Customer Service at either 0742511381 or 0742511394.

2. **Condition for Valid Return**:
   - Proof of Purchase: The document you received with your product.
   - Original Packaging: Manufacturer packaging.
   - Any Free Promotional Items: Gifts or accessories delivered with the purchased item.
   - Valid Reason: If the Item is Faulty, as stated in the policy.

3. **Items Not Acceptable for Return**:
   - Innerwear, swimsuits, gym wear, sleep wear
   - Perfumes, jewelry, health & wellness products, adult toys

4. **Returning an Item**:
   - You can send your item to Kibuga by calling Customer Service or dropping it off at their offices/Warehouse.
   - If the item is damaged during transit, it will be rejected by the rider and sent back for quality check.

5. **Tracking Your Return Status**:
   - Kibuga will keep you updated via email and SMS about your return status.
   - You can contact Customer Service Call Center at 0742511381/0742511394 for any inquiries or to fill out the form.

6. **Return Process**:
   - Kibuga will perform a quality check on your returned item.
   - If the claim is valid, you will receive a refund according to your requested method within 2 days from when your return request was submitted.
   - If the claim is invalid, the item will be sent back to you.

7. **Additional Information**:
   - Kibuga may store any returned items at their warehouse for up to seven (7) days if not collected and dispose of them in accordance with Ugandan law after this period.
   - Customers who have unjustified or invalid returns may lose the right to return future items or shop on Kibuga.

8. **Gifts**:
   - Any gift included with your purchase must also be returned along with the product.

9. **Shipping Charges**:
   - There are no charges for shipping a product back to Kibuga.

10. **After 2-Day Timeline**:
    - Returns after the 2-day timeline are not possible, as stated in the policy.

By following these steps and adhering to the conditions outlined, you can return your item and receive a refund from Kibuga.

The full returns procedure from request to refund involves several steps:

1. **Notification**: Notify Kibuga within 2 days of receiving the purchase by calling Customer Service at 0742511381/0742511394.

2. **Return Request Submission**: Submit a return request through the notification process, which includes providing proof of purchase (document handed over to you together with the product on delivery), original packaging, and any free promotional items delivered with the purchased item.

3. **Quality Check**: Kibuga will perform a quality check on the returned item(s).

4. **Validation of Claim**: If the claim is valid, Kibuga will issue a refund according to the requested method (store credits, wallet refunds, vouchers, mobile money transfer, bank transfers, or other methods as determined by Kibuga from time to time). The process may take up to 2 days.

5. **Invalid Claims**: If the claim is invalid, the item(s) will be sent back to you. Kibuga keeps track of all return requests for improvement and customer profiling purposes.

6. **Warranty Check**: For defective items, advise contacting the manufacturer if the product has a warranty.

7. **Shipping**: Returned products are accepted by Kibuga on behalf of the seller. Shipping fees (as stated on the refunds page) will be managed in accordance with the marketplace's refund policies.

8. **Tracking Status**: Customers can track their return status through updates via email and SMS, or contact Customer Service Call Center at 0742511381/0742511394 for inquiries.

9. **Warranty Information**: Check the warranty page for more information about Kibuga's warranty policy.

10. **Invalid Returns Handling**: If a return is invalid, Kibuga will call to explain and send the item back at no cost. After two attempts, if not collected within seven days, the product will be disposed of in accordance with Ugandan law.

If the claim is valid, you will receive a refund according to your requested method within 2 days from when your return was submitted. However, if the claim is invalid, the item will be sent back to you.

Kibuga keeps track of all return requests for improvement and customer profiling purposes. Customers with unjustified or invalid returns may lose their right to return items in the future.

If a product is not under warranty, Kibuga advises checking our warranty page for more information about our policy. For missing items or damaged products, especially broken screens, you should check with our riders during delivery and reject on the spot if necessary.

There are no shipping charges when returning a product to Kibuga. If you have any gifts included in your purchase, they must also be returned.
